_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: we were able to detect the delivered recombinant protein 48 h after intracellular delivery in normal Schwann cells
details: Successfully delivered recombinant proteins intracellularly with detectable levels maintained for at least 48h post-delivery in normal Schwann cells
